questionText: Specify the agricultural or forest management practice(s) implemented on your own land with climate change mitigation and/or adaptation benefits and provide a corresponding emissions figure, if known.
questionKo: 농업 산림 관리 (s) 기후 변경 / 제공 배출량,.
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: This question elicits specific and detailed information about the land management practices adopted by your organization. This information provides data users with an indication of how committed you are to mitigating and adapting to the effects of climate change. Demonstrating an understanding of climate-related benefits related to agricultural/forestry practices is best practice in this sector.

options: Change in the topography or landscapes
Governmental or institutional policies and programs
Practices to increase wood production and forest productivity
Pest, disease and weed management practices
Replacing fossil fuels by renewable energy sources
Restoration of degraded lands and cultivated organic soils
Selecting species to maximize carbon capture

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 7.67.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 만 표시됨 만약 귀사 선택 "예" 응답 7.67.

guidance.text:
General
If your organization undertakes many actions, please prioritize those that have had or/is expected to have the greatest benefit to your business (e.g. in reducing CO2e emissions, saving costs, increasing productivity).
Management practice reference number (column 1)
Select an identifier for each of your management practices. This reference number shall be used to track progress on your specific project in the following years.
You may report up to 20 management practices
Management practice (column 2)
Select the option that best describes the management practice adopted by your organization.
If none of the options are applicable to your organization, select ‘Other, please specify' and indicate the management practice that you have undertaken. If you need more than 40 characters, please use column 3 (Description of…).
Description of management practice (column 3)
Provide a brief company-specific description of your practice, including the methods and tools used to implement it.
Indicate which parts of your business the management practice is applicable (e.g. company-wide, selected facilities or regions).
Provide an explanation as to why you have chosen this practice and how you expect this to mitigate climate change effects and improve your business resilience.
Specify a timeframe for which you expect to receive benefits from the implementation of this practice.
Primary climate change related benefit (column 4)
Select the primary benefit (or expected benefit) provided by your action.
If none of the options are applicable to your organization, select ‘Other, please specify' and indicate the primary climate change related benefit you expect to experience.
Estimated CO2e savings (metric tons CO2e) (column 5)
Provide an estimated CO2e savings figure associated with the action you selected in column 2 (Management practice). This should reflect the total CO2e in metric tons that has been saved (or is expected to be saved) due to the specific implemented practice.
Please explain (column 6)
Specify and provide a description of the methods and tools used to calculate your figure reported in column 5, and indicate any exclusions.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
Management practice reference number
Management practice
Description of management practice
Primary climate change-related benefit
Estimated CO 2 e savings (metric tons CO 2 e)
Please explain
MP1 
Permanent soil cover (including cover crops) 
We
adopted cover crops for all our farms in Argentina, Uruguay and Brazil (85% of
our direct operations). We have implemented
cover-cropping practices because it reduces soil exposure/erosion, increases
soil organic matter content, improves water retention, soil structure and
overall soil health. 
Benefits are already expected after the first year, in our case the
coming reporting year.
Emissions reductions (mitigation) 
287 
We quantified the benefits of reducing our GHG emissions using the Cool
Farm Tool and included in the assessment all our farms where we currently use
cover crops. Results: 1437 kg CO 2 e 
per hectare per year reduction in GHG emissions.
As we manage 200 hectares, we expect a total emissions reduction per year of 287
tCO 2 e.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 9/9 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 마다 완료 행 비례 숫자 입력 의 행 공시된. 부분적으로 완료된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 최대 9/9점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded AND figure greater than 0 provided in at least one row in column 'Estimated CO2e savings (metric tons CO2e)' to be eligible for Awareness points.
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows: any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Primary climate change-related benefit'.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points awarded - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 전체 인지 점수수수 부여됨 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

change.q2025_text: Specify the agricultural or forest management practice(s) implemented on your own land with climate change mitigation and/or adaptation benefits and provide a corresponding emissions figure, if known.
change.daml_summary:
Agricultural commodities: D 9/9 | A 3/3 | M 1/1 | L 0/0
Food, beverage & tobacco: D 9/9 | A 3/3 | M 1/1 | L 0/0
Paper & forestry: D 9/9 | A 3/3 | M 1/1 | L 0/0

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

sectorTagsKo: 농산물 원자재, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '산림 관리 (s) 기후 변경 / 제공 배출량,.'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: 2025 CDP 국문 양식 및 2026 CDP 원문 기준 국문 보정
